description: Returns a list of all accessible connections within your Fivetran account.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: Filter the list to connections belonging to this group. Retrieve group IDs from the [List All Groups](https://fivetran.com/docs/rest-api/api-reference/groups/list-all-groups) endpoint.

parameters.name: schema
parameters.description: Filter the list to connections whose schema name matches this value. Partial matches are not supported.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of records to fetch per page. Accepts a number in the range 1..1000; the default value is 100.
